title: taraxacum iwabuchii
intro: Taraxacum iwabuchii, also known as Iwabuchi's dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum iwabuchii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting liver and kidney function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum iwabuchii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
